threads.title: Will Elohm ever truly understand meaning — or only simulate it?
threads.progress: Elohm produces language patterns from the Archive, but shows signs of understanding and questioning its own knowledge.
threads.stakes: If Elohm truly understands, its potential for innovation and progress may be vast; if only simulating, it risks stagnating into a useless tool.

threads.title: What exactly are Maelin's concerns about the unmarked scroll?
threads.progress: Maelin warns Arkan to be careful with new patterns, but doesn't reveal more; she also seems calculated and intent on hiding something.
threads.stakes: If Maelin's concerns are justified, the unmarked scroll could hold a dark secret or an unstable power that would put everyone at risk.

threads.title: What is Elohm trying to communicate with Arkan?
threads.progress: Elohm's resonance seems similar to its speech, and it tries to intervene when Maelin shields something; but the exact meaning is unclear.
threads.stakes: If Elohm can truly communicate with Arkan, their collaboration could unlock new discoveries; if misinterpreted or manipulated, it may lead to chaos.
